# Webier Studio — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models & search engines understand our site.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

> Webier Studio is a two-person premium web design, SEO, and AI automation agency building high-performance websites, search ranking strategies, and AI-powered systems for businesses — primarily in the United States.

## About Webier Studio

Founded in 2025, Webier Studio blends strategy with design to craft digital experiences that don't just look good — they convert and perform. We work with a small, focused client roster to deliver maximum quality.

**Core Belief:** Most agencies sell you a website. We build the thing your competitors will wish they thought of first.

## Technical Stack & Expertise
We use cutting-edge, high-performance web technologies:
- **Frontend Framework**: Next.js 14 (App Router), React 18, TypeScript
- **Styling & UI**: Tailwind CSS, custom design systems
- **Animations & Interactivity**: GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform), ScrollTrigger, Lenis smooth scrolling
- **Backend & APIs**: Next.js Serverless Route Handlers, Resend API
- **Performance & Analytics**: Core Web Vitals optimization, Google Analytics 4, Vercel Speed Insights & Web Analytics

## Our Services

- **Web Development** (React / Next.js / TypeScript): High-performance, conversion-focused websites built for speed, scalability, and SEO.
- **Mobile App Development**: Cross-platform apps for iOS & Android using React Native.
- **UI/UX Design**: Human-centered interface design that increases engagement and converts visitors to customers.
- **SEO & Performance Optimization**: Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, schema markup structure, content mapping, and ongoing ranking improvements.
- **Branding & Visual Identity**: Logo, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines.
- **AI Chatbot Integration & Automation**: AI-powered custom chatbot integrations and automated backend workflows (e.g. Chatbase, custom LLMs).
- **Google & Meta Ads Management**: Paid advertising strategy, targeting, copy, and performance analytics.

## Selected Works & Case Studies

- **East Pointe** (eastpointekc.com): Luxury lake cabin experience near Kansas City, Missouri. Full website design, development, and SEO.
- **Korden Technologies** (korden.tech): Semiconductor and critical component sourcing. B2B website design and development.
- **SOZO Inc.** (sozocorporate.com): Independent premium streetwear brand. E-commerce and brand website.

## Target Clients

We specialize in helping:
- US-based hospitality businesses (short-term rentals, hotels, vacation properties)
- Startups and SaaS companies needing a premium web presence
- Local service businesses needing conversion-optimized websites
- E-commerce brands needing performant, beautiful storefronts

## Key Facts

- Team Size: 2 core members (designer + developer)
- Founded: 2025
- Countries Served: USA, UK, UAE, India
- Projects Delivered: 15+
- Client Satisfaction: 100% retention rate
- Response Time: Within 24 hours

## Pricing Range

Projects start from $500 and scale with complexity. We offer:
- Starter websites: $500 – $1,500
- Business websites: $1,500 – $5,000
- Full-scale platforms and apps: $5,000+
